all.label: All applications
all.description: Comprehensive overview of all SafeX 360 platform modules

pilotage.label: Steering
pilotage.description: Dashboard, reports, analytics and annual planning

securite.label: Safety
securite.description: Prevention, risks, PPE, communication and emergency response

sante.label: Health
sante.description: Dosimetry, medical surveillance, fitness for work

iso.label: ISO System
iso.description: Audits, non-conformities, corrective actions and documentation

admin.label: Administration
admin.description: Users, modules, settings and help center

card.emptyTitle: No module in this category yet
card.emptyBody: New modules will be added here in upcoming phases.

preventives-activities.title: Preventive Activities
preventives-activities.description: Inspections, field observations and proactive reporting to anticipate risks.

preventives-activities-2.title: Activity Monitoring
preventives-activities-2.description: Reporting and investigation of HSE incidents, accidents and near-misses.

actions-managers.title: Corrective Actions
actions-managers.description: Tracking of action plans from incidents, audits and non-conformities (ISO 45001 §10.2).

pending-actions-hub.title: Approval Hub
pending-actions-hub.description: Centralizes all approvals and validations awaiting the user.

risk-management.title: Risk Management
risk-management.description: Identification, assessment and treatment of risks per the ISO 31000 methodology.

emergency-management.title: Emergency Management
emergency-management.description: SOS, general alerts, evacuations and real-time assembly points (ISO 45001 §8.2).

dosimetry.title: Dosimetry & Exposures
dosimetry.description: Individual dose tracking, medical surveillance and exceedance alerts (ICRP 103 / IAEA GSR Part 3).

blast.title: Blast Management
blast.description: Blast planning, automatic reminders and evacuation reports after the general alert.

ppe-management.title: PPE Management
ppe-management.description: Catalogue, individual issuance and tracking of protective equipment.

audits-management.title: Internal Audits
audits-management.description: Annual programme, on-site execution and recommendations per ISO 19011.

compliance-management.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance-management.description: Legal requirements monitoring, assignment to positions and supporting documents.

planning.title: Annual Planning
planning.description: 12-month × 7-category HSE calendar with monthly themes and activities.

knowledge-management.title: Knowledge Center
knowledge-management.description: Capturing lessons learned and documentary library.

communication-management.title: Safety Communication
communication-management.description: Toolbox talks, targeted notifications and HSE awareness campaigns.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.description: Dashboards, LTIFR/TRIFR indicators and multi-period trend analyses.

help.title: Help Center
help.description: User guides, functional overview and technical documentation.

admin.title: Administration
admin.description: Definition of annual HSE targets and performance forecasts (LTIFR, TRIFR, training).

parameters.title: Settings
parameters.description: Operational references (sites, incident types, severities) and advanced system settings.

users-management-hub.title: User Management
users-management-hub.description: User accounts, HSE business roles and granular per-module permissions.

modules-management.title: Module Management
modules-management.description: Enable/disable HSE modules per mine (mines × modules matrix, ISO 45001 compliance).
